form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Force at this track last start over 300m (16.96). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Parklands (30.53) in a Mix 5, finishing a 6 length sixth. Has never missed the placings from six starts off this box. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on March 12 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.45, behind Kisses For Me. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Others preferred at this stage.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing eighth (20.63) at Q Lakeside before going for a four months spell. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (19.15) over 350m at this track. Looks to have the job ahead.
